name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: I’m grateful no Americans were hurt last night. The fact remains—we haven’t heard any long term strategy from President Trump on Iran. We must lower tensions in the region with diplomacy and Congress must exercise its oversight authority to prevent an unintended war.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Monitoring the situation in Iraq and my thoughts are with our servicemembers, personnel, and all others there tonight.   We are quickly heading to a point of no return in the region. We must use diplomacy to deescalate and keep Americans safe at home and abroad.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: I agree. The U.S. must abide by international humanitarian law – it’s both shameful and dangerous that POTUS is stating otherwise, and that Senate Republicans have enabled this behavior by blocking this important resolution.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The American people deserve a fair, honest and thorough trial that includes key documents and testimony from relevant witnesses. It’s not just disappointing, but deceptive of McConnell to suggest these details will be ironed out later while working to ensure the opposite.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Let this remind us that Americans serve all around the world, often facing threats you don’t see in headlines. We must have a robust strategy to help Somalia’s fragile gov't fight Al Shabab and to protect American citizens abroad.  https://t.co/P2hygt0U15

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: It’s disappointing to see drug prices raised on hundreds of medicines in the new year, even though too many Americans already struggle to afford them.   My Prescription Drug Affordability and Access Act would curb these and other price hikes.  https://t.co/pA1Ff71BbK?

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Today’s event in New Jersey reminds us all of the power of faith and love in the face of unspeakable evil. May we always remember that the ties that bind us are much stronger than those that divide us, and that love will always conquer hate.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Happy New Year! Hope that you and your loved ones have an incredible year. In 2020, let’s resolve to bring more service, love, and peace into the world.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: John Lewis is one of the greatest agents of change in American history—I wouldn't be a US Senator if it weren't for the chain of protest unleashed by his act of protest on an Alabama bridge.  Holding him in my heart as he battles cancer. Keep fighting, keep making good trouble ✊🏾

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Horrified by this news. Anti-Semitism has no place anywhere in this country. We must unify as Americans against this hatred. My deepest sympathies are with the victims, their families, and the Jewish community in Monsey and across America.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Merry Christmas to you and your family! Hope your day is filled with peace, happiness, and good times with loved ones.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Glad to hear that Omoyele Sowore has been released from prison, though it’s unfortunate he can't join his family in NJ for the holidays. Now, the Nigerian government must assure his continued safety & security as he awaits his trial & cease their concerning attacks on the press.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Sgt 1st Class Michael Goble served valiantly, with honor and distinction. New Jersey—and our country—owe him and his family a debt we can never repay. My deepest condolences go out to his family. May he rest in peace.    https://t.co/KP12gspFOk

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Wishing everyone celebrating Hanukkah a joyous night full of light and love.  https://t.co/kCJeBobSor

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Trump admin’s cruel war to repeal #ACA continues—and health care for 135 million people w/ pre-existing conditions is at stake. 800,000 New Jerseyans alone could lose coverage. Health care is a fundamental right & we must continue to fight for it.     https://t.co/W22bq8ewnc

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Big news in NJ. Congrats to @maketheroadnj and all of the #LetsDriveNJ coalition members who worked so closely with NJ Legislators and @GovMurphy to make this a reality. This law will lift barriers for over 700,000 people to get a license & make our roads safer.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Two years after the Trump tax bill, New Jersey families continue to suffer. Glad that the House voted today to restore the SALT deduction to give New Jerseyans much needed relief. Now, the Senate must follow suit.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: I stand with @TheBlackCaucus against this cruel rule change that will cut SNAP benefits for nearly 700,000 people. That’s thousands who will struggle to put food on the table because of the Trump administration. And thousands who could go hungry during the holiday season.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: We must treat this with the seriousness it demands. When I entered the Senate, I swore an oath to protect and defend the Constitution—and I’ll uphold that oath as the trial begins.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Today is a sad & sobering moment for the country. After embarking on a path for facts & the truth, the House has presented us with evidence that the President abused his power for personal gain, compromised our national security & obstructed the investigation into his misconduct.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The right to vote is the very foundation of our democracy—and we shouldn’t allow past mistakes to prevent people from participating in it. Glad that NJ took this important step in restoring fairness to our justice system.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: So many formerly incarcerated people face steep barriers to employment long after they’ve paid their debt to society. With our #FairChanceAct, they finally have access to a meaningful second chance. Thanks to all who worked hard for this, including the late Rep. Cummings.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: 📢 UPDATE: There's still time to sign up for health insurance! The deadline has been extended through today to 3am EST on Wednesday, December 18th.   Visit  https://t.co/KUCOPppRQu or call 1-800-318-2596 to review your options and enroll. #GetCovered

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Anti-Semitism has no place in our country or anywhere. Period. That’s why I’m proud to join @SenJackyRosen and @SenatorLankford’s task force to combat this hatred in NJ and across the country.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Our independent family farmers and ranchers deserve better. My bill won’t just protect them from unfair practices, it’ll also hold corporate integrators accountable for harm to public health and the environment.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: An impeachment trial is a solemn duty to be taken seriously. When it begins, all Senators take an oath to “do impartial justice”—and Americans deserve a fair and thorough review of the evidence. The Senate should move forward with @SenSchumer’s request for a bipartisan trial.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: TODAY is the final day of open enrollment. Access to healthcare is a right—visit  https://t.co/KUCOPp8grU or call 1-800-318-2596 to find the right plan for you and your family and #GetCovered for 2020.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Do you know a high school student working to improve race relations in their community? Nominate them for the Princeton Prize in Race Relations. Applications are due Friday, 1/31. Apply or nominate someone here:  https://t.co/kDvDIHlwzr

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Don’t miss out—open enrollment ends TOMORROW. Be sure to #GetCovered by visiting  https://t.co/KUCOPppRQu or calling 1-800-318-2596 and find the right plan for you and your family.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: I stand w/ the Armenian community in NJ & across the US—we must never forget what happened. We must remember the 1.5 million lives lost. And we must ensure this never happens again. Thanks to @SenatorMenendez’s leadership, this long overdue resolution passed in the Senate.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Tonight's vigil reflected the beautiful diversity that is Jersey City. Hate has no place here. We must steadfastly commit ourselves to creating a world where no family member or community has to endure the pain felt in Jersey City right now.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Too many formerly incarcerated individuals struggle to reintegrate into society because of difficulty finding a job after they’ve been in prison or jail. Grateful to partner w/ @SenRonJohnson & to have worked w/ Rep Cummings on this bipartisan legislation that will change lives.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Thank you @JerseyCityPD, first responders & all law enforcement officers who showed bravery today. My prayers are w/ the victims of this tragedy. Now, let’s continue the investigation, honor Det. Seals’ sacrifice, pray for the injured officers, & work to end gun violence.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Once again, we’re faced with scenes of carnage, fear, and loss. It’s reprehensible that in America, residents are shot while grocery shopping, officers are slain while protecting the community, and children are sheltering in place at school. This cannot become our new normal.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: We are monitoring the shooting in Jersey City closely. Thankful to the law enforcement officers who reacted quickly and bravely, and my thoughts are with all of the first responders still on the scene working to keep area residents safe.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Mayor Chuck Chiarello was a true public servant who dedicated his career to improving the lives of the people of Buena Vista Township. My deepest condolences to his family—he will be dearly missed.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Voting rights are under attack across the nation. That’s why today’s House passage of the Voting Rights Advancement Act is so important.  I’ll work with @SenatorLeahy to advance it in the Senate—this bill is critical to ensuring every voice is heard in our democracy.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: It’s appalling that NJ journalist Omoyele Sowore was re-arrested in Nigeria hours after his release. This is a shocking affront to the country’s rule of law and Nigeria must cease its dangerous attacks on freedom of expression.     https://t.co/BFxisma3OO

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Minority-serving institutions provide crucial educational opportunities to millions of students of color in the U.S. Thanks to the #FUTUREAct, 13 MSIs throughout NJ will receive nearly $50 million in necessary funding for academic assistance, scholarships, and more.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: @itsgabrielleu @jay_suth No one should be denied a job, an education, or face discrimination because of their hairstyle. Period.   That’s why I’m introducing #CROWNAct with @RepRichmond. Because discrimination against black hair is discrimination against Black people. Let’s end it now.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: @itsgabrielleu These biases don’t just exist at work—they exist in society at large, where black people are told their hair is unkempt, dirty, and more. @jay_suth’s dreadlocks aren’t “awful,” they’re a representation of who he is.     https://t.co/Je1Y7rw9Cw

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Black women constantly face pressure to wear their hair a certain way at work—or risk opportunities. It’s despicable that @itsgabrielleu was told her hair was “too black” for work.     https://t.co/vDyWTRR0K8

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: A year ago, a referee forced Andrew Johnson to cut his dreadlocks during a wrestling match in NJ or risk forfeiting. He deserved better. Rules about hair length often discriminate against natural hairstyles—this must stop.     https://t.co/rQFvlq2DM0

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Every day, black people face discrimination just for wearing their natural hairstyles. For expressing their cultural heritage through locs, braids, and more, they’re being fired from jobs, harassed, and denied civil rights. Just take a look ⬇️

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Calvin West dedicated his life to the city of Newark and its people. He was one of this city’s fiercest advocates, and Newark is a better, stronger place because of his leadership. He will be deeply missed.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: We must address & investigate algorithmic bias in healthcare systems.  That’s why @RonWyden & I are demanding answers from the @FTC, @CMSgov & healthcare execs. How widespread is this issue? How are they handling it? How do we fix it?  Find out more 👇     https://t.co/K4eovDhcqX

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Last month, a healthcare program affecting 70 million people underestimated black patients’ needs, denying many proper care.   Its algorithm failed those patients—because these systems often have historical & human biases built in. And that puts marginalized communities at risk.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Happy Thanksgiving to everyone in New Jersey and across the country. Hope your day is full of great food, time with loved ones, and gratitude for all we have.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: No child should be punished because their family is too poor. But under @USDA’s cruel SNAP proposal, nearly #1MillionKids could lose access to free school meals. This is unacceptable.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: We can’t defeat hate and bigotry with more hate—we must tackle it head-on with love and acts of kindness. Thank you Keri for recognizing this, and for fighting this darkness with light. The Syracuse community is stronger for it.      https://t.co/fDs9yX81to

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: At a time when voting rights are under attack all across our nation, I’m glad the NJ Assembly is restoring justice to our justice system by moving to allow the formerly incarcerated to vote. Our democracy is strengthened when more people can vote, not fewer.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The highway rescission would’ve severely hampered New Jersey’s ability to make needed improvements to our roads and highways. Glad that today’s repeal passed so that we can make our infrastructure safer and more reliable for all New Jerseyans.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Thank you @WeAreUnidosUS, @AFTunion, @UNCF, @nwlc, @CLASP_DC, @SupportGenHope, @ACNJforKids, @NJACCRRA, @HACUDC, @NBCDI, @NJCommColleges, @ZEROTOTHREE, and @EdReformNowUSA for your support for this bill and work on this important issue.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: 40% of Black women in college, along w/ 36% of Native American women & 26% of Latinas, are parents. More than ⅔ of student parents live below 200% of the poverty line.  Expanding access to childcare would give them crucial support & help set their children up for later success.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: My bill would make critical investments in child care at community colleges & MSIs. Schools would be able to apply for up to $20 million in grants to provide free, high-quality child care to student parents and invest in early childhood educators.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: 1 in 5 college students are parents. But since 2002, child care has been disappearing from college campuses. In NJ alone, just half of community colleges have on-campus child care.  Student parents already face unique hurdles. Let’s lift their burdens with the #PROSPECTAct.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Fridays under the lights shaped my life and this should be a safe place for our children.  My heart is with the victims and their families of last night’s senseless shooting—no one should have to experience what Camden and Pleasantville students, families, and fans just did.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Thank you @SenSanders and @SenKamalaHarris for co-sponsoring this important legislation and for working with me to make drugs affordable for Americans.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Drug prices are 4x higher on avg in the US than in other developed nations. This crisis requires systemic change.  The Prescription Drug Affordability & Access Act would increase price transparency, hold drug manufacturers accountable & help lower costs for millions of Americans.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: My new bill would completely change drug pricing in the US.  It would create an independent agency to review list prices for medications—if corporations don’t comply, HHS can void their patent so another entity can make a generic version at a lower price.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: 30% of Americans aren’t taking their medications as prescribed because they can’t afford them.  In the world’s richest country, no one should have to choose between their health & basic necessities. It’s time for us to step in and #LowerDrugPricesNow for working Americans. ⬇️

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: It’s unjust to deny voting rights for those who have served their time. Thank you @shavondasumter for working to restore voting rights to the formerly incarcerated & rectify this moral wrong. W/ my Next Step Act, we can also do this federally.    https://t.co/ggALjmLH6A

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: We must address the injustice, cruelty, brutality & inhumanity of slavery in the U.S. Glad NJ is taking the approach of our federal bill on reparations, creating a commission to study the issue, evaluate slavery’s impact & recommend solutions. Here’s why this is so important 👇

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: I strongly condemn the rocket attacks against Israel. Our security aid to Israel ensured the damage wasn’t worse—that support must continue.  But with each senseless act of violence, more innocent lives are lost. As a new ceasefire takes hold, I urge restraint & calm in the area.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: From 2000-2014, our maternal mortality rate increased by 26%. And black women are 4x likelier to die from childbirth complications than white women.   The Health Subcommittee’s passage is a crucial step in tackling this crisis & these disparities. The Senate should follow suit.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Between invading Syria, jailing reporters, eroding Turkey’s democracy—& now new reports of war crimes against Syrian civilians—there’s no reason to roll out the red carpet for Erdogan.  Trump, stop capitulating to autocrats & start standing up for our national security & values.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Today, SCOTUS hears oral arguments in Trump’s case against #DACA. For nearly 700,000 Dreamers in the U.S, including more than 15,000 in NJ, the future is uncertain. But know that we’re here for you, we’ll fight for you & we’ll do everything we can to protect you. #HomeIsHere

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: This #VeteransDay, let’s thank our service members & veterans for their sacrifice, renew our commitment to them—and be honest about the ways we’re falling short in supporting them.  Read my op-ed on how we can do better for veterans in NJ & the nation 👇    https://t.co/NoKTlfKsIv

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Outing a whistleblower is wrong. Period. It’s also illegal and dangerous.   How will future whistleblowers feel safe reporting government corruption if this precedent is set? Trump and his associates can’t keep bullying public servants who put their country first.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Senate Republicans let $255 million in funding for minority-serving institutions like HBCUs expire over a month ago.   These schools serve millions of students across the nation. We must invest in them, their mission, and their students’ futures. We need the #FUTUREActNow.  https://t.co/MannhvPHtI

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Since Sec. Chao has secretly seen these crumbling tunnels firsthand, there’s no excuse why the Gateway & Portal Bridge Projects haven’t moved forward. This inaction isn’t only impacting millions of NY/NJ commuters everyday, it’s impacting the entire nation.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: My father was born poor during segregation—going to an HBCU changed his life.  HBCUs & Minority-Serving Institutions are vital to students of color, like thousands in NJ. But federal $ lapsed in Sept.  @senatemajldr—there are thousands in KY too. Let's pass the #FUTUREAct now.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: New Jersey—Today is #ElectionDay. Be sure to get out to the polls and ensure that your voice is heard.   ☑️ Polls are open 6am-8pm across the state.  🗳️ Find out where to vote at  https://t.co/KEPEgGtZZy  👥 RT and help remind friends and family to vote.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: In 2017, Pres. Trump said he’d pull out of the Paris Accords. Today, he's officially starting the process.  Climate change is an existential crisis. We can’t just act—we must lead. By withdrawing, Trump is eroding confidence in the U.S. & putting us on the wrong side of history.

name: Sen. Cory Booker

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: 🚨 Open enrollment for ACA coverage starts TODAY and runs until December 15. Health care is a human right—and all Americans deserve access.  For more information & to find the best plan for you and your family, visit  https://t.co/KUCOPppRQu or call 1-800-318-2596 and #GetCovered.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Empezando MAÑANA, puede inscribirse para cobertura de salud. Cuidado de salud es un derecho humano que todos merecen.   Por más información sobre cómo inscribirse, visite a  https://t.co/mzI2DcFC2f o llama 1-800-318-2596.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Open enrollment for ACA coverage begins TOMORROW. Every American deserves access to health care—it’s a human right.  For all the information you need to #GetCovered, check out  https://t.co/KUCOPppRQu or call 1-800-318-2596 to find what works best for you.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Today marks 7 years since Hurricane Sandy devastated our state. As we reflect, let’s remember how New Jerseyans came together to rebuild.   But there’s still work to be done. We must support communities still recovering from the storm & make NJ more resilient for the future.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Wishing a happy #Diwali to everyone celebrating in New Jersey and around the world.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: From serving in our armed forces, to fighting for labor rights, Filipinos have enriched the cultural landscape of NJ & beyond. This Filipino-American History Month, let’s recognize their vast contributions to the fabric of this nation. #FAHM

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: For years, airlines have outsourced jobs, worsening working conditions & keeping wages low. Workers deserve better.  My Airline Accountability Act w/ @SenSherrodBrown would withhold federal contracts from airlines w/ labor violations or that contract w/ law-breaking vendors.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Exciting news—this development may lead to desperately needed cures for sickle cell disease and HIV. And to be truly accessible, these cures must be affordable both globally and in the U.S. Thank you @NIH and @gatesfoundation for your leadership.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: We’re in a national housing crisis: 🏠 We have 37 affordable units for every 100 low-income households. 💵 The avg rent for 2-bedroom apts is 3x the minimum wage.  We must act. My bill w/ @WhipClyburn would provide monthly tax credits for renters & support inclusive zoning laws.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Today’s vote against restoring SALT hurts New Jerseyans.   The Republican tax cuts benefited corporations off the backs of the middle-class. We’ll keep fighting to give NJ families the relief they deserve.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: This bill is the first to solely focus on neglected diseases of poverty within the U.S.  It would create a task force to raise awareness & find ways to prevent, diagnose & treat these illnesses.  We can’t overlook this issue simply because it primarily affects those in poverty.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Hookworm in rural Alabama.  Chagas as far north as Pennsylvania.  We associate these w/ developing nations, but these parasites & diseases of poverty impact an estimated 12m people in highly impoverished areas of the US, which often lack access to clean water & proper sanitation.  https://t.co/eRfRn8ywqZ

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: In the richest country in the world, no child should be shamed because their family is struggling to make ends meet. Thank you @SpeakerCoughlin and @SenMTeresaRuiz for working to ensure every child in NJ has access to healthy meals at school.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: 📢📢 Calling all undergraduate students! We’re currently accepting applications for our spring internship programs in DC and NJ! Deadline is November 1st.   Find out more and apply here:  https://t.co/JY4mvr2g4s

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Congressman Elijah Cummings was a voice for the voiceless, a powerful fighter for equality, and a tireless advocate for justice. He dedicated his life to making this country a better place for all, and Congress is a stronger place because of him. May he #RestInPower.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: @RepHorsford @GiffordsCourage @BlackBrownGVP In NJ alone, the costs are $1.8 billion per year. A 10% reduction in gun violence would save our state $12 million.  We know what works—all that’s required is the courage to implement these solutions.

Young Black men in NJ are 90x likelier to die of gun violence than white men.  Let’s #BreaktheCycle of violence.  https://t.co/yU4XQTK01w

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Legislative Aide Tomás Delgado works on veterans’ issues, defense, foreign affairs, & homeland security. Like many immigrants, he’s felt in the past as if he needed to prove he’s a true American—but these experiences have just made him more resilient. #HispanicHeritageMonth  https://t.co/0k4jNb0y7B

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: NJ native Juan Gomez didn’t think people like him worked on the Hill. But during his internship, he realized that Washington needed more voices from immigrant households. Now, he works on labor, healthcare, & immigration policy. #HispanicHeritageMonth  https://t.co/yh76W9rmom

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: Staff Assistant Gloria Nuñez was raised by a strong immigrant mom. But the 2016 election didn’t reflect the values she was taught or the future her mom wanted for her kids. So she got involved to help make the U.S. better for other immigrant families. #HispanicHeritageMonth  https://t.co/6wMYBP8XFx

name: Sen. Cory Booker

tweet: I want to especially thank my House partner on the Next Step Act – @RepBonnie – for joining me in this work of introducing the most comprehensive criminal justice bill in decades.   We hope this bill garners the same kind of bipartisan support as the First Step Act.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would improve the reporting of police use-of-force incidents (currently DOJ is required to report use-of-force stats to Congress, but states & local law enforcement agencies don't have to pass that info on to federal authorities, creating a big gap in data)

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would ban racial and religious profiling.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would provide better training for law enforcement officers in implicit racial bias, de-escalation, and use-of-force.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would improve the ability of those behind bars to stay in touch w/ loved ones, by banning the practice of charging high rates for phone calls (> $400-$500 / month) & ensuring authorities consider where someone’s kids are when placing them in a federal facility.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would ensure that anyone released from federal prison receives meaningful assistance in obtaining a photo-ID, birth certificate, social security card, or work authorization documents.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would create a federal pathway to sealing the records of nonviolent drug offenses for adults and automatically sealing (and in some cases expunging) juvenile records.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would reinstate the right to vote in federal elections for formerly incarcerated individuals (blacks are more than four times as likely than whites to have their voting rights revoked because of a criminal conviction).

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would remove barriers for people with criminal convictions to receive an occupational license for jobs, such as hair dressers and taxi drivers.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would “Ban the Box” by prohibiting federal employers & contractors from asking a job applicant about criminal history until final stages of interview process, so formerly incarcerated individuals get a more objective shot at finding meaningful employment.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would end the federal prohibition on marijuana, expunge records, and reinvest in the communities most harmed by the War on Drugs.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would eliminate the disparity between crack and powder cocaine sentences (currently it is 18:1 but this bill would bring down to 1:1) AND make it retroactive.

name: Sen. Cory Booker
tweet: The Next Step Act would reduce harsh mandatory minimums for nonviolent drug offenses: the 20-year mandatory minimum would be reduced to 10 years, the 10-year mandatory minimum would be reduced to 5 years, and the 5-year mandatory minimum would be reduced to 2 years.
